practice.task: Count the number of employees in each department.
practice.title: Department Counts
practice.code:
-- TODO: Write a GROUP BY query
-- Table: employees (id, name, department)

solutionCode: SELECT department, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM employees GROUP BY department;
meta:
TITLE: Department Counts
TASK: Count the number of employees in each department.
EXPECTED_OUTPUT: Engineering|2
Marketing|1
HINT: Use GROUP BY with COUNT(*).

variants.label: correct
variants.code: SELECT department, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM employees GROUP BY department;
